title: Zuvo Plastic Food Containers with Lids - Pack of 10 - Leak Proof, Microwave & Freezer Safe Container Sets Food Storage Containers for Batch Cooking, Lunch Box & Takeaway Containers (500 ML - 10 Pack)
features: 𝐌𝐔𝐋𝐓𝐈𝐏𝐔𝐑𝐏𝐎𝐒𝐄: Zuvo plastic food reusable containers are perfect for catering party portions, office, work, school, travel, baking, roasting pan, cakes, oven, steam table picnic, BBQ, chafers, buffet or takeaway and much more.

𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐌𝐈𝐔𝐌 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍: Zuvo plastic containers have a leakproof square design for any food storage and organization needs. It helps to keep wet or dry food fresh and healthy for longer. Ideal for food stocks, curry, rice and salad bowls with lids.

𝐇𝐄𝐀𝐕𝐘 𝐃𝐔𝐓𝐘: Easy and convenient solution for any occasion. Containers are durable and assist with the leak resistance required for takeaways etc. Stackable, dishwasher-safe, microwave & freezer safe, BPA-free plastic.

𝐒𝐀𝐕𝐄 𝐓𝐈𝐌𝐄, 𝐌𝐎𝐍𝐄𝐘 𝐀𝐍𝐃 𝐒𝐏𝐀𝐂𝐄: Our reusable Container will be the dishwasher safe, kitchen's best friend, affordable enough to dispose of during your busy day. Conveniently sized containers, you will save space in your fridge.

𝐅𝐔𝐋𝐋 𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈?𝐅𝐀𝐂𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍: Our products are tested by SGS, a world leader in product safety testing, and are certified by the FDA as food safe. Prepare meals for your busy week and use these affordable meal containers for the whole week.
